title: sterculia ripicola
intro: Sterculia ripicola, also known as the river sterculia, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Sterculia ripicola include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Sterculia ripicola is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or as a dried powder, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
